heading: Service of process
label: 154711 Service of process
text: The corporation shall comply with the law on service of process of each State in which it is incorporated and each State in which it carries on activities.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)15471136:4004., , .Apr. 6, 1988Pub. L. 100–281, § 4102 Stat. 73The words “in furtherance of its corporate purposes” are omitted as unnecessary.
